MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-29-2008 Continued To Jan-12-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-24-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Sacramento for Plaintiff Frank Sweis, who is present.
Defendants are not present this date.

Joseph Sacramento, counsel for Plaintiff, advises that a tentative settlement agreement has been reached between the parties for premisis located at 1143 Kearny Street, San Francisco, CA. At the request of counsel, this matter will remain on the trial calendar for 12/29/08 for status.

JPT Ora Prochovnick, Clerk Melinka Jones, not reported. (218)
